plan.tone_notes: This user has a concrete deliverable with a hard deadline and a specific first action — the tone should be cold, focused precision, not motivational warmth. Think locker room at 4am, not halftime speech.
plan.hero_anchor_strategy: Reference Kobe's documented practice of arriving at the Staples Center at 4am to work on specific weaknesses in isolation — not general greatness, but the deliberate targeting of one thing before the world woke up. This maps directly to the user shipping one specific section of one specific doc before noon, while others haven't started their day.
plan.grounding_phrase_placement: After the hero anchor and before the closing command — it functions as the hinge between what Kobe knew and what the user must now do. The phrase 'trust the work' lands hardest when the motivation has already been established and the only thing left is execution.
plan.command_structure: Two-beat imperative with a physical escalation — 'open it. write the wedge.' The period between beats forces a pause that mimics deliberate action, not urgency.
plan.raw_response:
```json
{
  "tone_notes": "This user has a concrete deliverable with a hard deadline and a specific first action — the tone should be cold, focused precision, not motivational warmth. Think locker room at 4am, not halftime speech.",
  "hero_anchor_strategy": "Reference Kobe's documented practice of arriving at the Staples Center at 4am to work on specific weaknesses in isolation — not general greatness, but the deliberate targeting of one thing before the world woke up. This maps directly to the user shipping one specific section of one specific doc before noon, while others haven't started their day.",
  "grounding_phrase_placement": "After the hero anchor and before the closing command — it functions as the hinge between what Kobe knew and what the user must now do. The phrase 'trust the work' lands hardest when the motivation has already been established and the only thing left is execution.",
  "command_structure": "Two-beat imperative with a physical escalation — 'open it. write the wedge.' The period between beats forces a pause that mimics deliberate action, not urgency.",
  "estimated_complexity": "medium"
}
```

candidates.script:
It is 5am.
The room is dark.
You are already behind.

Last night you said you would ship the OATH v1 spec to GitHub
and send Oliver the link before noon.
Not a plan.
A contract.

Kobe was at Staples Center at 4am.
Not for the crowd.
Not for the highlight.
To work one specific weakness into the floor
before anyone else laced up.
One thing. Isolated. Repeated.
Done before the world started its day.

This is the same thing.

Trust the work.

Sixty minutes. Phone face down.
Open the spec doc.
Write the wedge section.
One section becomes the whole.
The whole becomes the link.
The link goes to Oliver before noon.

Nothing else exists until the wedge section is done.

Open it.

critiques.critique_notes: The Kobe reference is strong on time (4am) and place (Staples Center) but the habit description — 'work one specific weakness into the floor' — is slightly abstract and invented rather than tied to a documented, concrete drill or routine. To hit a 10, it should name a specific, verifiable habit (e.g., 'post footwork drills' or 'mid-range pull-up repetitions from the elbow') so the anchor feels earned rather than atmospheric. The current phrasing gestures at specificity without fully landing it.
critiques.raw_response:
```json
{
  "scores": {
    "specificity": 9,
    "command_density": 8,
    "structural_arc_completeness": 10,
    "cliche_freedom": 8,
    "hero_anchor_concreteness": 8,
    "voice_directness": 9
  },
  "weakest_axis": "hero_anchor_concreteness",
  "critique_notes": "The Kobe reference is strong on time (4am) and place (Staples Center) but the habit description — 'work one specific weakness into the floor' — is slightly abstract and invented rather than tied to a documented, concrete drill or routine. To hit a 10, it should name a specific, verifiable habit (e.g., 'post footwork drills' or 'mid-range pull-up repetitions from the elbow') so the anchor feels earned rather than atmospheric. The current phrasing gestures at specificity without fully landing it."
}
```

critiques.critique_notes: The phrase 'before the rest of the league had opened their eyes' edges into motivational-poster territory, and 'One section becomes the whole' has the rhythm of a self-help aphorism rather than earned specificity. The Kobe block is strong but 'the work was done before anyone else's day began' is a mild cliché that softens what is otherwise a concrete image. Replace these lines with harder, more literal language tied to the spec itself or the Staples Center detail already established.

critiques.critique_notes: The line 'The rest of the day was built on that hour' edges into motivational-poster territory, and 'One section becomes the whole' has a faint aphoristic softness that feels slightly borrowed rather than earned. To fix, replace these with more concrete mechanical language that mirrors the spec-shipping context — e.g., describe what Kobe actually did after that session, or reframe the section-to-whole logic in terms of the OATH spec's actual structure rather than a general truth.

stage_6_judge.judge_notes: The 'debt coming due' framing hits hard and the Kobe analogy is specific enough to feel earned rather than generic — isolating one weakness before anyone else laces up maps cleanly onto 'write the wedge section.' The closing sequence is a tight action chain that leaves no ambiguity about what to do next.
